shakshi: The player found Giann at the Fae Tree in the center of Mercurie — Heart of Kael, he receives rather than pursues
Giann and Keshi are siblings — opposing poles of the same generative force. He knows what his sister does when she sees an opportunity.
Giann gave the player a genuine boon — a tool that requires the player to do something with it, not a shortcut
Giann gave knowledge of a cure for Keshi's plague — requires alchemy rank 65 to act on. No knowledge of who is infected.
The player has the cure formula and sufficient alchemy rank — can now find and treat the infected if they connect the plague to the deal
The player has the cure formula but insufficient alchemy rank — must train to 65 before acting on it
Giann's boon for players who refused Keshi — transmute any metal upward one grade at the cost of density. Generative rather than extractive.
The player has now encountered both siblings — one pursued, one received. One offered power without knowledge, one offered knowledge or craft. The contrast is complete.
The Fae Tree at the center of Mercurie located — a landmark in the Faewilds journal exposure map
The player understands the level-up system — 10 skill points and a perk point per level, distributed via journal
